abilities.description: Draw a card, then discard a card.
CARDNAME becomes a copy of target creature card in your graveyard with mana value X, except it has flying and this ability. Activate only as a sorcery.

effect.description: CARDNAME becomes a copy of target creature card in your graveyard with mana value X, except it has flying and this ability. Activate only as a sorcery.
effect.name: Clone

abilities.target_prompt: Select target creature card in your graveyard
